name: PipelineTerraformModulePublish
description: Publish a Terraform module version to HCP Terraform or a private Terraform registry
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: registryType
inputs.label: Registry type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target registry platform.

inputs.name: namespace
inputs.label: Module namespace
inputs.helpMarkDown: Registry namespace. For HCP Terraform this is the organization name.

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: Module name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Module name without the terraform-<provider>- prefix (e.g. networking-vpc).

inputs.name: provider
inputs.label: Provider / system
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target provider or system, e.g. aws, azurerm, google.

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semantic version to publish, e.g. 1.2.3.

inputs.name: registryUrl
inputs.label: Registry base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of the private registry, e.g. https://registry.example.com.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.label: API key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Registry API key with modules:write scope. Pass a secret pipeline variable, e.g. $(tfregistry-api-key).

inputs.name: skipTlsVerify
inputs.label: Skip TLS verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: Disable TLS certificate verification. Use only for internal registries fronted by a private CA the agent does not trust; prefer installing the CA via NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS.

inputs.name: scmProviderId
inputs.label: SCM provider ID (auto-create)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. UUID of a configured SCM provider connection in the registry. Set this together with repositoryOwner and repositoryName to auto-create and SCM-link a module that does not yet exist, instead of failing. Leave empty to require the module to be pre-registered.

inputs.name: repositoryOwner
inputs.label: Repository owner / project (auto-create)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Repository owner recorded on the SCM link when auto-creating a module. For Azure DevOps this is the project name; for GitHub/GitLab the org or user. Required only when auto-creating (with scmProviderId and repositoryName).

inputs.name: repositoryName
inputs.label: Repository name (auto-create)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Source repository name recorded on the SCM link when auto-creating a module. Required only when auto-creating (with scmProviderId and repositoryOwner).

inputs.name: defaultBranch
inputs.label: Default branch (auto-create)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Default branch recorded on the SCM link when auto-creating a module.

inputs.name: tagPattern
inputs.label: Tag pattern (auto-create)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Glob matched against git tags to import versions when auto-creating a module (default: v*).

inputs.name: hcpAddress
inputs.label: HCP / TFE address
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base address of HCP Terraform or Terraform Enterprise.

inputs.name: hcpToken
inputs.label: HCP API token
inputs.helpMarkDown: HCP Terraform team or user API token. Pass a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: vcsRepoIdentifier
inputs.label: VCS repo identifier
inputs.helpMarkDown: Used only when the module does not yet exist, to create a VCS-connected module. Example: my-org/my-project/_git/terraform-aws-vpc.

inputs.name: vcsBranch
inputs.label: VCS branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Branch for the VCS-connected module.

inputs.name: vcsOauthTokenId
inputs.label: VCS OAuth token ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: HCP VCS OAuth token ID (ot-xxxxxxxx). Required only when creating a new VCS-connected module.

inputs.name: commitSha
inputs.label: Commit SHA
inputs.helpMarkDown: Commit SHA for the module version.

inputs.name: waitForPublish
inputs.label: Wait for version to be available
inputs.helpMarkDown: Poll the registry until the published version is available.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.label: Wait timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum time to wait for the version to become available.
